sous_titres.text: It's not as easy as it looks.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0003_time_45.00s-60.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Out this window is the billboard for my show.
I'm the headliner. Which means I'm the star.
I look pretty ferocious, don't I?
I'm never really angry, but I can pretend.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0004_time_60.00s-75.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: For 20 years humans have come from miles around to visit me
at the Big Top Mall and Video Arcade at exit eight.
And this is our tent, where we perform inside the mall.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0005_time_75.00s-90.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: - Our show will commence in five minutes! - Five.
This is Mack. I've known him for as long as I can remember.
He's a little bit of a ham.
I thank you all for coming! Hello there!

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0006_time_90.00s-105.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I'm not sure the accent's foolin' anyone.
Welcome to the littlest big top on Earth!
Prepare yourselves for the most marvelously majestic animal show,
the likes of which you have never seen!

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0007_time_105.00s-120.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: The best baseball-playing chicken you've ever seen.
The batter is now approaching the plate.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0008_time_120.00s-135.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I will not drop the ball. I'm gonna drop the ball.
But his act is always perfect.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0009_time_135.00s-150.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Murphy's always a big hit with the kids.
Now, the queen of the Big Top, Stella!

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0010_time_150.00s-165.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Stella is my oldest and wisest friend.
She's been performing since before I was born.
She knows more than I'll ever know.
Now, where's my favorite poodle gone?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0011_time_165.00s-180.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Snickers brings a lot of class to the show.
I love an audience. Best part of the day.
They nail their routine every time.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0012_time_180.00s-195.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: - Come on, Snickers. Let's do this. - Okay, Stella. Ready when you are.
He's not supposed to be here, but he...
He sure makes himself at home.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0013_time_195.00s-210.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Now, the moment you've all been waiting for.
I don't do any tricks. Mack says it's enough for me to be me.
But I'm the headliner, so I come on last.
Sounds like a lot of pressure, I know, but I love my job.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0014_time_210.00s-225.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Wait for it, wait for it...

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0015_time_225.00s-240.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: And then a little chest thump.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0016_time_240.00s-255.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: She comes by my domain every night because her father, George, works here.
She could sit anywhere, but she always chooses to sit by me.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0017_time_255.00s-270.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: - What do you think, Ivan? - How about that?
That's the real me right there.
Hey, Jules, that's a good one.
George, your girl's got some serious talent.
She gets it from her mother.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0018_time_270.00s-285.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: She has her good days and bad days.
And these things, they take time.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0019_time_285.00s-300.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: why don't you go buy yourself some new crayons?
You don't need to do that, Mack.
- Thank you so much. - You're welcome.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0020_time_300.00s-315.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Go quick, all right? We gotta get going.
School's out soon. Things always pick up then.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0021_time_315.00s-330.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: This won't even begin to cover food and rent.
We gotta pack 'em in again. Get the excitement back, you know?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0022_time_330.00s-345.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Then what are we gonna do?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0023_time_345.00s-360.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0024_time_360.00s-375.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Don't you just love the moon, with its untroubled smile?
I love the feel of sun on my belly.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0025_time_375.00s-390.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: It is an impressive belly, my friend.
- Thank you. - Somebody loves sleeping on it.
You know, the first night he snuck in here he was half this size.
He was adorable. I dreamt I ate a furry doughnut.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0026_time_390.00s-405.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Stella, you remember when this place was packed with people?
Three shows a day. Standing room only.
You think it's not like that anymore because of me?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0027_time_405.00s-420.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Do you think I've lost my edge?
I mean, if they want an angry gorilla, I can still be that.
Why do they want an angry gorilla anyway?
I think humans like us one way.
And gorillas they see as angry.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0028_time_420.00s-435.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: My father used to say, "Anger is precious.
Use it to keep order and warn others of danger."
But here, there's no one to protect.
Sometimes it's hard to roar for no reason.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0029_time_435.00s-450.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I didn't touch the kibble. It wasn't me.
Are you guys talking about me?
'Cause whatever it is, I didn't do it.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0030_time_450.00s-465.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I'm the headliner. I got this.

sous_titres.text: Let's give 'em a great show, okay?
We're in this together, kid. I know we can turn this around.

sous_titres.text: All right, curtain up in ten minutes.
- All right, Murph. Showtime. - It's all under control.
Do the words "Bird for sale" mean anything to you? Do they?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\The One and Only Ivan [2020, WEB-DL 1080p] MVO (HDRezka Studio) + Original (Eng) + Sub (rus, eng)\interval_0033_time_495.00s-510.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: - "Bird for sale"? - Yeah, well, just remember that.

sous_titres.text: - Still, not a lot of people out there. - Thank you. Ta-ta!

sous_titres.text: Sometimes when I'm drawing, I see you watching me.
I just got some new crayons.

sous_titres.text: So, I thought maybe you'd like my old ones?

sous_titres.text: What are you gonna do with that?

- Don't you wish you could have some? - It's like a dream come true.

sous_titres.text: Let's hope he's not hangin' around tonight.
All right. See you in the morning, Snickers.

He's comin'. You're skating on thin ice, buddy.

sous_titres.text: How many times have I gotta tell you to get that mutt outta here?
Look, your job is to keep our animals in their cages

sous_titres.text: You know, it's ebb and flow.

sous_titres.text: And that is our show. Thank you, ladies and gentlemen.

sous_titres.text: What? You should be teaching a class.

sous_titres.text: A little presumptuous, don't you think?
